mapper.sql: id, username, password, name, phone,gender,school,major,classes, status, create_time as createTime
mapper.select: select from tb_user where username = #{userName} and password = #{password}

select from tb_user
and username like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
mapper.insert: insert into tb_user (username, password, name, phone, gender,school,major,classes,status) values (#{userName}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone},#{gender},#{school},#{major},#{classes}, #{status})
